oneLineSummary: Meeting-first case advocacy app (iOS/iPad/Web PWA) with evidence briefing and real-time notes. State-first, zero hallucinations, encrypted local data.

backend.architecture: State-first (Evidence → Claims → Confidence → Human approval → Display)

currentPhase.name: Phase 2: Design Polish + Data Integration
parallelTracks: libbyclaudecode: Build UI (schemas → confidence → iPad interface)

keyArchitecturePoints.data: 12 entities with schemas (SourceDocument, EvidenceCard, Claim, Matter, etc)
keyArchitecturePoints.interface: iPad briefing console (Summary | Timeline | Evidence | Notes | Responses | Tasks)
keyArchitecturePoints.hallucination: Zero: templates only, all backed by sources, every statement tagged with confidence

nextPriorities: Schemas: Define all 12 entities in code
Meeting mode: Live unfolding with confidence badges
Templates: Medical chronology + accommodation statement + ODSP brief

installationForUsers.iOS: Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen
installationForUsers.Web: Direct browser or Chrome install prompt

successCriteria: iPad interface with all 6 tabs working
